footer.company_desc: DSCC is a Saudi enterprise contracting and engineering house delivering turnkey solutions across residential, commercial, hospitality, and infrastructure sectors throughout the Kingdom and the GCC.
footer.newsletter_sub: Quarterly insights from the Kingdom's contracting front lines.
footer.made_in: Designed & engineered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

about.title: Built for the Kingdom's most demanding clients.
about.intro: DSCC was founded in Riyadh to bring engineering-led contracting and turnkey fit-out to Saudi owners who refused to compromise on quality, speed, or accountability. Two decades on, we operate from Riyadh, Jeddah, and Dammam, with a 250-strong specialist team and active projects across every region of the Kingdom.
about.mission: To be the Kingdom's most trusted single-source contractor — engineering, supplying, installing, and maintaining the spaces that define modern Saudi Arabia.

values.title: Engineering integrity
values.desc: Every system we deliver is engineered, never improvised.

values.title: Saudi-grade quality
values.desc: Materials, finishes, and craftsmanship matched to the Kingdom's most ambitious projects.

values.title: Operational discipline
values.desc: Programmes met, budgets respected, handovers clean.

values.title: Long-term partnership
values.desc: We stay with the building long after handover.

about.leadership_sub: Decades of engineering and delivery experience across the Kingdom.
about.certifications: ISO 9001 • ISO 14001 • ISO 45001 • SASO • Saudi Civil Defense • LEED • Mostadam

quote.title: Request a project quotation
quote.subtitle: Six steps. Roughly two minutes. We respond within one business day.
quote.step_4_sub: Drawings, BOQ, photos, references — anything that helps us scope your project faster.
quote.review_intro: Please review the details below. You can step back to edit anything.
quote.success_team: A DSCC specialist will respond within one business day.

chatbot.title: Sara — DSCC AI Sales Engineer
chatbot.subtitle: Online • bilingual
chatbot.greet: Hello — I'm Sara, the DSCC AI sales engineer. In about two minutes I can scope your project, recommend the right team, and route you to a quotation. Shall we begin?
chatbot.ask_type: Great. What kind of project are you planning?
chatbot.ask_services: Which services do you need? (you can pick several)
chatbot.ask_size: Roughly how big is the project?
chatbot.ask_timeline: When are you hoping to start?
chatbot.ask_budget: What budget range are you working with? (SAR)
chatbot.ask_scope: What scope do you need from DSCC?
chatbot.ask_company: And which company are you with? (optional)
chatbot.ask_phone: What's the best phone number to reach you?
chatbot.thanks: Thank you. A DSCC specialist will follow up within one business day.
chatbot.tagline: Your smart assistant — scope your project in 2 minutes
chatbot.teaser_body: Talk to Sara now — instant answers, around the clock.
chatbot.empty_reply: I didn't get a reply. Could you rephrase?
